name: avatar-group
description: Stacked row of Avatars with configurable max count and +N overflow indicator.

props.name: avatars
props.description: Array of avatar data objects, each with optional source, initials, and color

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum number of avatars to display before showing the +N overflow indicator

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset passed to each Avatar in the group

props.name: overlap
props.description: Pixel amount each avatar overlaps the previous one
